LoginRedirect_Dialog_Description: Melden Sie sich an, um dieses Produkt Ihrer Wunschliste hinzuzufügen, ihm zu folgen oder es als ignoriert zu markieren. Mit einem Klick auf „OK“ werden Sie zur Anmeldeseite weitergeleitet.
Wishlist_NotSignedIn: Melden Sie sich an oder öffnen Sie diese Seite in der Steam-Desktopanwendung, um Ihre Wunschliste zu ergänzen, ein Follower zu werden und Käufe zu tätigen.
VerifiedProgram_DeckSubTitle: Dieses und viele weitere Spiele wurden getestet und sind %1$s.
VerifiedProgram_DeckDisclaimer: Der Trailer entspricht möglicherweise nicht dem tatsächlichen Gameplay auf dem Steam Deck.
SteamURLInvalid: Error URL not to a Steam property (store/community)
Reserationn_NoListJoined: Select up to %1$s of the models below to join the list
Reservation_InPool: You joined the list for the selected models below on %2$s
Reservation_InPool_NoDate: You are on the list for the selected models below
Reservation_Cancel_Pool_Desc: By leaving you will not be included in the randomized list for this model. Are you sure?
Reservation_JoinPool_Terms: I've read and accept the <1>Terms and Conditions</1>.
Reservation_JoinPool_ClickTerms: Please review the Terms and Conditions below
Reservation_Pool_NotSignedIn: Sign in to join the list
Reservation_Pool_NotSignedIn_Desc: Sign in to Steam to join the list. Select OK to go to the sign in page.
Reservation_InPool_Message: Join the list any time before June 25th at 10 a.m. PT. On that date, the list will be closed and randomized, and you will receive an email with your results shortly after.
Reservation_Cancel_Waitlist_Desc: By leaving the waitlist you are giving up your spot in the waitlist. Re-joining the waitlist will move you to the end of the list.
Reservation_Change_WaitList_Desc1: By switching waitlists, you are leaving the waitlist for %1$s and giving up your spot in line.
Reservation_Change_WaitList_Desc2: You are joining the waitlist for %1$s.
Reservation_In_Waitlist_WithName_NoDate: You are on the waitlist for %1$s
Reservation_In_Waitlist_Message: We will email you if a unit becomes available.
Reservation_In_Waitlist_Message_NotJoin: Join the waitlist, and you will be notified if units become available.
Reservation_Waitlist_NotSignedIn: Sign in to join the waitlist
Reservation_Waitlist_NotSignedIn_Desc: Sign in to Steam to join the waitlist. Select OK to go to the sign in page.
Reservation_OnRegularReserveForModel: You are in the reservation queue for %1$s
